reviews.comment:
El lugar es lindo , pero la comida deja mucho  que desear ,Dice hamburguesas grandes completa  y te traen un Paty con jamón y queso que te cobran 260 pesos.

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice, but the food leaves a lot to be desired. They say they have big burgers and they bring you a patty with ham and cheese that costs 260 pesos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeXU2Q0JREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo que te cobren 75 mangos por sentarte a tomar un agua mineral. Horrible lo que hacen, primera y última vez que paro aca.

(Translated by Google)
It's awful that they charge 75 pesos just to sit and drink a bottle of mineral water. What they do is horrible; first and last time I'll ever stop here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeElhTEZREAE
